title: JIPMER Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Clinical Trial Coordinator Posts
description: The Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Clinical Trial Coordinator Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree can apply for the JIPMER Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education d...
